title: MC之旅(MC Journey) mod
description: Mod version of MC Journey/MC Journey的mod版本
body:
![1.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea5b6e34c3645b6f1df2ca31f2ed063eb3186e77.png)

**这是[MC之旅](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mc-journey)整合包的主要mod版本，与整合包内容相同，将会同步更新**

MC之旅是为了在保留原版游玩方式的前提下，使Minecraft的内容更加丰富多彩，更加具有趣味性、挑战性，同时也能够帮助新手适应Minecraft的游玩方式而开发的整合包。

## 进度

完全重制了原版的进度，添加了更多具有引导性、挑战性的进度以及挑战。
直至目前，已经添加了183个进度。

## 结构

此部分的内容尚在开发阶段。将会替换原版中大部分结构。

## 声明

制作不易，赞助一下吧 爱发电：https://afdian.com/a/CODEZPC?tab=home

**整合包内所有的进度以及结构均为本人开发**

## 提交Bug

发送电子邮件到**zpcpy@outlook.com**，或QQ号：2682389781。

# English

**This is the main mod version of [MC Journey](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mc-journey) modpack, which has the same content as the modpack and will be updated synchronously.**

MC Journey is a modpack developed to make Minecraft more colorful, interesting and challenging while retaining the original way of playing, and at the same time help newbies adapt to the way of playing Minecraft.

## Advancement

Completely remade the original advancement, adding more guided advancement, and more challenging challenges.
So far, 183 advancements have been added.

## Structure

This section is still in the development stage. It will replace most of the structures in the original version.

## File a bug

Sent an email to **zpcpy@outlook.com**.

## Herald

**All progress and structures in the package are developed by me!**
